---
title: "Sophie Pardehpoosh"
image: photo.png
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophie-pardehpoosh-8b473b227 
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/spardehpoosh
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:spardehpoosh@ucsb.edu
---

My name is Sophie Pardehpoosh and I am a fourth-year environmental studies student at UC Santa Barbara. I am currently taking ENV 193DS in which I am building my statistical knowledge, and learning how to use R. To demonstrate my coding skills, I have made this website. 

## Education

University of California, Santa Barbara | Santa Barbara, CA
BS in Environmental Studies | Sept 2022 - June 2026
